zh.Frodsham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆
zh.Frodsham Manor, Hellesby, Cheshire, Engl: 英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Hellesby於1174年出生在英國英格蘭爾福洛善姆時，他的父親Sir Joceramus de Hellesby32歲，母親Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby29歲。他於1180年與Leuca de Mobberley在英國英格蘭爾莫波利結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1247年在法國皮卡迪索姆享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Hellesby于1174年出生在英国英格兰爾福洛善姆时，他的父亲Sir Joceramus de Hellesby32岁，母亲Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby29岁。他于1180年与Leuca de Mobberley在英国英格兰爾莫波利结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1247年在法国皮卡迪索姆享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Hellesby was born in 1174, in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Joceramus de Hellesby, was 32 and his mother, Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, was 29. He married Leuca de Mobberley in 1180, in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1247, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Hellesby est né en 1174, à Frodsham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Joceramus de Hellesby, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Leuca de Mobberley en 1180, à Mobberley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1247, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Hellesby 1174 in Frodsham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Joceramus de Hellesby 32 und seine Mutter Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby 29. Er hat 1180 in Mobberley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Leuca de Mobberley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1247 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Hellesby è nato il nel 1174 nel Frodsham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Joceramus de Hellesby, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Leuca de Mobberley nel 1180, nel Mobberley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1247, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Hellesbyが1174年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアフロドシャムで生まれた時，父Sir Joceramus de Hellesbyは32歳，母Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesbyは29歳であった。1180年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアモバーリーでLeuca de Mobberleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1247年にフランスピカーディソンメで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Hellesby(이)가 1174년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 프로드샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Joceramus de Hellesby(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 모브벌리에서 Leuca de Mobberley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1247년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Hellesby nasceu em 1174, em Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Joceramus de Hellesby, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Leuca de Mobberley em 1180, em Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1247, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Hellesby родился в 1174 г. в местности фродшам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Joceramus de Hellesby было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Leuca de Mobberley в 1180 г. в местности моббирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1247 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Hellesby nació en 1174, en Frodsham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Joceramus de Hellesby, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Lady Agatha de Massey, Baroness Hellesby, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Leuca de Mobberley en 1180, en Mobberley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1247, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 73 años.
